---
title: "Natalie Annett"
image: "nat.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/natalie-annett-a94238194/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/na22010"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:annettwannisa@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website
---
 
## Bio

Hi, my name is Natalie Annett and I am a 3rd Politics and 
  International Relations student, with a specific interest in 
  geopolitics. I enjoy reading in my spare time outside of my 
  academic responsibilities and I particularly enjoy philosophical 
  books that tend to be intertwined with politics. 

## Education

**University of Essex** | Colchester, UK

BSc Politics and International Relations | October 2022 - Present
